bluetooth_confirm.description: Do you want to set up {name}?

user.description: Select a discovered cat printer. Make sure it is powered on and in range.

abort.no_devices_found: No cat printers were discovered. Make sure the printer is powered on and in range of a Bluetooth adapter.

print_image.name: Print image
print_image.description: Print an image on a cat printer. The image is scaled to the paper width and dithered to black and white.

image.name: Image
image.description: An http(s) URL or a local file path (the directory must be in allowlist_external_dirs).

dither.name: Dithering
dither.description: Algorithm used to convert the image to black and white.

print_text.name: Print text
print_text.description: Render text and print it on a cat printer.

message.name: Message
message.description: The text to print. Long lines are wrapped to the paper width.
